title: Gratitude log
description: Notice small things you appreciated. Save only when it feels useful - no streaks, no pressure.

empty.title: Nothing here yet
empty.description: Add one small thing you appreciated today.

editor.createDescription: Write one to three things you appreciated. Small counts.
editor.notePlaceholder: Add a little context if it helps.
editor.saveError: Couldn't save your entry. Try again.

detail.title: Gratitude entry
detail.itemsDescription: Saved privately for your own reflection.
detail.notFound: We couldn't find that gratitude entry.
detail.deleteError: Couldn't delete this entry. Try again.

confirmDelete.title: Delete this entry?
confirmDelete.message: This permanently removes the entry. It can't be recovered.
